linkTitle: Vaillant boiler repair in London and Sussex
metaTitle: Vaillant Boiler Repair in London and Sussex | Local Gas Engineer
metaDescription: Need Vaillant boiler repair in London and Sussex? Local support for pressure loss, ignition faults, leaks, no hot water and common fault codes.
h1: Vaillant Boiler Repair in London and Sussex
intro: We repair Vaillant boilers across London and Sussex, including common problems such as pressure loss, ignition issues, leaks, no hot water and repeated lockouts.
pricingGuidance: Vaillant repair pricing depends on the fault, model and whether replacement parts are required after diagnosis.
localProof: Called for Vaillant breakdowns across Camden, Islington and surrounding London and Sussex areas where quick diagnosis matters.

sections.heading: Common Vaillant boiler faults
sections.body: We regularly see Vaillant boilers with pressure loss, ignition trouble, hot water issues and leaks that need proper diagnosis rather than guesswork.

sections.heading: Fault codes are only the starting point
sections.body: A Vaillant fault code is helpful, but it does not replace diagnosis. The code still needs to be matched to what the boiler and system are actually doing.

sections.heading: Repair or replace?
sections.body: That depends on the age of the boiler, the fault involved and whether there is a history of repeat breakdowns. We explain the sensible route once the problem is confirmed.

reviews.name: Daniel S.
reviews.quote: Our Vaillant kept locking out and they found the real cause instead of just clearing the code.
